title: India’s Pronto formalizes house help as its valuation jumps 8x in under a year
description: Pronto handles 18,000 daily bookings and plans rapid expansion as it races rivals to digitize India's largely offline home services market.

title: Stripe wants to turn your AI costs into a profit center
description: Stripe released a preview intended to allow AI companies to easily track, pass through, and make a profit on underlying AI model fees.

title: Geopolitical drama reportedly stalls IPO of SoftBank-backed PayPay
description: The Japan-based company reportedly aimed for a public valuation of at least ¥1.5 trillion ($10 billion).

title: No one has a good plan for how AI companies should work with the government
description: As OpenAI transitions from a wildly successful consumer startup into a piece of national security infrastructure, the company seems unequipped to manage its new responsibilities.

title: Instagram tracked growing usage while targeting teens, lawyers argue
description: The company said usage grew from 40 minutes per day in 2023 to 46 minutes in 2026. Other documents referenced teens as being a top priority for the app before asking existing users for birthdays.

title: Users are ditching ChatGPT for Claude — here’s how to make the switch
description: Following controversies surrounding ChatGPT, many users are ditching the AI chatbot for Claude instead. Here's how to make the switch.

title: Paramount+ and HBO Max to merge into one streaming service after WBD deal closes
description: Ellison reassured investors that HBO’s identity and creative vision as a studio would remain unchanged, stating, “Our viewpoint is HBO should stay HBO.”

title: Tech workers urge DOD, Congress to withdraw Anthropic label as a supply-chain risk
description: Tech workers have signed an open letter urging the Department of Defense to withdraw its designation of Anthropic as a "supply chain risk" and instead to settle the matter quietly.

title: X adds ‘Paid Partnership’ labels so creators can ditch the hashtags
description: The new labels comply with regulations and allow creators to be more transparent with their followers.

title: Hacktivists claim to have hacked Homeland Security to release ICE contract data
description: A hacking group called Department of Peace said they hacked a specific office within Homeland Security to protest ICE’s mass deportation campaign, and the companies aiding it.

title: A married founder duo’s company, 14.ai, is replacing customer support teams at startups
description: 14.ai also launched a consumer brand to understand how much AI can handle customer support tasks.

title: Apple speeds up the iPad Air with an M4 upgrade, starting at $599
description: Apple refreshes the iPad Air with the M4 chip and more memory to make it better for AI use cases.

title: Apple bakes in AI smarts into its new $599 iPhone 17e
description: The base model comes with 256 GB of storage, which Apple says is twice the entry storage from the previous generation at the same starting price.

title: Xiaomi, unlike Google and Samsung, thinks camera hardware comes first
Apple’s new Studio Display XDR adds a Mini LED upgrade
Apple launches M5 Pro and M5 Max chips
Apple announces M5 MacBook Air and updated MacBook Pro
